Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs/opposing counsel.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

RULING: Plaintiffs Jony Wood, Cheryl Buchanan's Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

There being no other appearance and no opposition, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs' motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is granted. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served as of the date of granting this motion on all defendants who have previously appeared. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court.

Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Matter Not Reported. (503/CML)
